Hero.title: Shinwa Corporation
Hero.description: Shinwa Corporation is a newly established company in Japan, founded on the principles of trust and harmony. We are committed to creating long-term value for our clients through diversified business operations. With an international perspective and cross-cultural communication strengths, Shinwa Corporation actively engages in four core business areas: IT consulting and software development, medical coordination, real estate, and international trade. Backed by extensive experience and a professional team, we always place our clients’ trust as our top priority and consistently deliver high-quality, reliable solutions.

About.title: About Us
About.a1:
・Providing software development and consulting for web, mobile, and PC platforms
・Offering software project management and Bridge SE (bridge system engineering) services
・Equipped with rich IT development and project management experience, capable of delivering efficient and flexible solutions
About.a2:
・Providing professional medical coordination services for overseas clients based on world-class Japanese medical resources
・Supporting precise medical examinations, medical translation, medical arrangements, hospital appointments, etc.
・Providing reliable and convenient medical services for those in need
About.a3:
・Engaging in real estate sales and rental services in Japan
・Focusing on whole-building apartment investments, combining long-term rental with short-term hotel or vacation rental operations
・Serving both domestic rental demand and overseas investors’ interests
About.a4:
・Specializing in the export of high-quality Japanese products to global markets
・Product categories include watches, fashion, cosmetics, beauty & healthcare products
・Aiming to bring Japan’s trusted and refined lifestyle to clients around the world

ContactUs.title: Contact Us
ContactUs.description: For technical support or business inquiries, please feel free to contact us at any time.

Solution.title: Customized Solutions EDA & Plugins
Solution.desc1: ・The future is event-driven, the freedom is plug-in. — Build a highly cohesive, loosely coupled business ecosystem.
Solution.desc2: ・From monolithic to modular, from coupled to decoupled. — One framework to master complex business.
Solution.desc3: ・Native support for CQRS and Event Bus. — A production-grade foundation for startups.

WebsitePreview.title: Website Preview Gallery
WebsitePreview.description: Showcasing multiple site experiences. Hover to pause, click to view a larger image.

Brix.title: BRIX Framework
Brix.subtitle: Next-generation plugin-driven enterprise application platform. Through Capability Contract and Plugin Runtime, decompose complex enterprise systems into independently developable, deployable, and upgradeable business plugins, achieving a Composable Platform architecture.

pluginDriven.title: Plugin-Driven Platform
pluginDriven.desc: Build enterprise systems with plugins. Brix decomposes enterprise systems into independent Business Capability Plugins through plugin architecture.

problems.title: Traditional Enterprise System Challenges
problems.p1: System complexity grows exponentially with business growth
problems.p2: Severe module coupling makes version upgrades difficult
problems.p3: Hard to quickly customize for different customer needs
problems.p4: Continuously high system evolution and maintenance costs

plugins.title: Runtime Capability Contract
plugins.desc: Each capability is an independent contract unit. Plugins only depend on capability interfaces, not implementations, enabling cross-environment reuse and hot-swapping.

modes.title: Deployment Modes
modes.desc: Brix supports three flexible deployment modes to meet different business scenarios.

standalone.title: Standalone Mode
standalone.desc: Build complete standalone platform products, suitable for SaaS delivery and private deployment scenarios.

embedded.title: Embedded Mode
embedded.desc: Embed business capabilities as plugins into existing customer systems, no need to replace customer tech stack, achieving progressive capability enhancement.

sdk.title: SDK & API Mode
sdk.desc: Open platform capabilities, support partner and third-party developer integration, building an ecosystem.

architecture.title: Platform Architecture
architecture.desc: Based on Runtime Shell architecture design, introducing Capability Contract System to achieve complete decoupling between plugins and infrastructure.

layer1.title: Host Layer
layer1.desc: Ultra-Thin Host design with pure configuration-driven assembly shell. Supports both Standalone Host and Embedded Host forms, providing equivalent capability interfaces.

layer2.title: Capability Contract
layer2.desc: Defines unified runtime interface standards between plugins: EventBus, StateStore, AuthContext, Lifecycle, Observability.

layer3.title: Business Plugins
layer3.desc: Enterprise business capabilities exist as plugins with full lifecycle management: Install → Activate → Update → Disable → Remove. Each plugin can be independently sold and deployed.

layer4.title: Frontend Runtime
layer4.desc: Module Federation-based frontend plugin architecture. Shared Runtime provides unified React, Router, State Management, resolving multi-plugin runtime dependency conflicts.

layer5.title: Infrastructure
layer5.desc: Cloud-Native architecture, connecting infrastructure through Adapter Pattern, plugin code has zero infrastructure dependencies.

techStack.title: Technology Stack
techStack.desc: Built on proven enterprise-grade open source technologies, ensuring production-level stability and community ecosystem support.
techStack.backend: Backend: Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka

fullStack.title: Full-Stack Plugin Architecture
fullStack.desc: Symmetric plugin architecture for frontend and backend. Both exist as plugins running on Host Runtime through unified Capability Contract, achieving Full-Stack Separation.

components.title: Plugin Structure
components.apiDesc: Interface Contract Layer - Service contracts and domain models
components.coreDesc: Core Logic Layer - Business rules and domain service implementations
components.serverDesc: Service Runtime Layer - REST/GraphQL endpoints and integrations
components.sharedDesc: Shared Capability Layer - Cross-plugin utilities and types
components.uiDesc: Frontend Layer - Web/Mobile user interface components

benefits.title: Architecture Benefits
benefits.b1: Unified development model, lower cognitive load
benefits.b2: Independent plugin deployment with canary release support
benefits.b3: Extremely low extension costs with linear growth
benefits.b4: Supports long-term platform evolution, avoiding architecture decay

ecosystem.title: Plugin Ecosystem
ecosystem.desc: Brix is more than a framework — it's a complete Plugin Ecosystem Platform supporting multi-tier commercial ecosystem development.

commercial.title: Commercial Layer
commercial.platformDesc: Complete platform solution with Runtime Shell and all core plugins
commercial.solutionDesc: Industry solution suite for specific vertical domains
commercial.bundleDesc: Feature module combinations for specific business scenarios
commercial.pluginDesc: Independent feature plugins with plug-and-play atomic capabilities

devex.title: Developer Experience
devex.desc: Runtime Shell complexity is invisible to plugin developers. Developers only need to understand Capability Contracts to build enterprise-grade plugins.

sdk.title: Plugin SDK
sdk.desc: Standardized dev kit, focus on business logic

tokens.title: Design Tokens
tokens.desc: Unified design system for UI consistency

value.title: Core Value
value.desc: Built on Runtime Shell architecture, delivering enterprise-grade platform capabilities.

platform.title: Zero Infrastructure Dependency
platform.desc: Plugins never directly depend on Kafka, Redis, or HTTP clients. All infrastructure interaction goes through Capability Contracts, enabling seamless migration across different Hosts.

solutions.title: Host Portability
solutions.desc: Standalone and Embedded Hosts expose identical Capability interfaces. Same plugin runs in different deployment modes without modification. Build Once, Deploy Anywhere.

ecosystem.title: Event-Driven Decoupling
ecosystem.desc: Plugins are unaware of each other, communicating only via Domain Events and Integration Events. Runtime Shell handles event routing and transformation with full observability.

separation.title: Full-Stack Separation
separation.desc: Frontend follows View → ViewModel → Repository pattern. Massive UI changes require zero backend modifications. Frontend and backend teams develop in parallel.

vision.title: Long-term Vision
vision.desc: Build a Plugin-Driven Industry Platform. Enterprise software becomes not a monolithic system, but a composable software ecosystem like an App Store.
